title: Web Scrape → Clean → RAG Ready
description: Scrape any website and automatically clean and chunk the content for RAG/LLM pipelines. Combines Website Content Crawler with RAG Post Processor in one click.

actors.title: Website Content Crawler
actors.description: Scrapes websites and extracts clean text content

actors.title: RAG Post Processor
actors.description: Cleans and chunks the scraped text for RAG/LLM ingestion
